signals.headline: X/Twitter Ban in Europe by Dec 31
signals.raw:
X/Twitter Ban in Europe by Dec 31? | NO (37% yes price holds steady) | MED confidence**

Active Twitter market on "X banned in any European country by December 31?" trades at **37% yes** with $7.2K volume and $17.2K liquidity, reflecting trader bets against a near-term ban despite ongoing debates—no fresh confirmations or whale moves noted to shift it.[4]
